title: Al Pastor Tacos
description: A twist on traditional Mexican tacos, using al pastor-style pork and topped with fresh cilantro and onion.

ingredients.name: Al pastor seasoning
ingredients.notes: Available at most grocery stores or online

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together al pastor seasoning, lime juice, and olive oil.
3. Add the pork shoulder to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Grill the pork for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
5. Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Slice the grilled pork into thin strips.
7. Assemble the tacos by placing a few slices of pork onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of roasted onion, a sprinkle of cilantro, and a dollop of Mexican crema.
8. Serve immediately and garnish with lime wedges.
